basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Admin Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management, Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management, Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Admin. Associate Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Kozhikode website. The last date to submit the application form is 27-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters' / Bachelors' degree in any subject. Administrative Experience of one year for Post-Graduates, and two years for Graduates.
qualification.details: Admin. Associate: Masters' / Bachelors' degree in any subject. Administrative Experience of one year in respect of Post-Graduates, and two years in respect of Graduates.

salary_details.details: Rs.27,800/- per month (including accommodation allowance of Rs.3,500/- and telephone allowance of Rs.300/-)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Kozhikode Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Admin. Associate post at IIM Kozhikode is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Admin. Associate position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Masters' or Bachelors' degree in any subject. Additionally, relevant administrative experience is required, one year for post-graduates and two years for graduates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Admin. Associate role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Admin. Associate position is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government norms, but these are not detailed in the provided summary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,800/- per month. This amount includes accommodation and telephone allowances.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Admin. Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Admin. Associate position at the Indian Institute of Management, Kozhikode, as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to fill and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Admin. Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an initial screening and shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the IIM Kozhikode Admin. Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, there is no mention of an application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contract basis for the Admin. Associate role at IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link will be available on the IIM Kozhikode website. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article for your convenience.
